response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned senior IC with roughly 15 years of development experience and a genuine passion for testing and developer tooling (test runners, assertion libraries, CI infrastructure, IDE components at National Instruments), but the role is a Level II people-management position and his resume shows no people management, no formal technical leadership tenure, and no experience leading organizational change. His dev-tools work is largely open-source side projects rather than sustained professional ownership of build/test infrastructure at scale, and his mobile exposure is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint. He would be a credible senior IC candidate on a productivity team, but not a fit for the manager role as scoped.
strengths: Strong testing and developer-tooling background: authored a test runner (Trial), assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure, and IDE components
15+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, multi-day courses, and community coding dojos
concerns: No people management experience; role requires 2+ years managing engineers with performance and development responsibilities
No evidence of 3+ years in a formal technical leadership role or of leading organizational change
Developer-tools work is fragmented across side projects and short stints rather than owning build/test infrastructure for a large platform ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Missing formal technical leadership track record
